runners.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 520m at this track beaten 11 lengths (29.89) behind Off The Chart in a NG on April 11. Has run hot time here with a 29.42 PB at the distance. Key chance.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 4.5 lengths second but did run a solid 29.85 over the 520m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

runners.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last three starts, the latest when third (29.92) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was carried wide rounding the turn out of the front straight.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (35.11) at The Gardens in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 9 lengths. Has three wins and six placings from 16 starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.
